title: Uday Varmora - DevOps Engineer Resume
summary: DevOps Engineer with **1+ year** managing **AWS infrastructure (EC2, S3, RDS, CloudFront)** for cloud-native, containerised services — sustaining **99.9% uptime**, cutting release cycles **82% (45 → 8 min)** and operational toil **70%** across 20+ services. Hands-on with **Python, Docker, Kubernetes (EKS), Terraform, Jenkins/GitHub Actions/AWS CodePipeline** and observability (**Prometheus, Grafana, Loki**); experienced in high-availability design, security, and cross-team delivery.
skills: Python, Bash/Shell, Linux (Ubuntu, Amazon Linux, RHEL), System Administration
AWS — EC2, S3, RDS, CloudFront, EKS, Lambda, ECR, VPC, CloudWatch
Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, AWS CodePipeline, AWS CodeBuild, ArgoCD
Docker, Kubernetes (EKS), Helm, Istio, Karpenter, KEDA, Ingress-NGINX
Terraform, AWS CloudFormation, AWS SAM, Ansible, Configuration Management
HashiCorp Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, IAM, KMS, TLS/SSL, Trivy Operator
Git, GitHub, Agile, Post-Incident Reviews, Runbooks

bullets: Provisioned and managed multi-environment **AWS infrastructure (EC2, EKS, S3, RDS, VPC, CloudFront)** using **Terraform IaC** (34 reusable modules, S3 remote state, DynamoDB locking) — delivering **high availability, scalability and security** across Dev, Staging and Production; sustained **99.9% uptime** across multi-AZ deployments and cut provisioning time **80%** with configuration drift **95%** reduced.

Designed and maintained **40+ CI/CD pipelines** using **Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD and AWS CodePipeline/CodeBuild** — automating end-to-end build, test and deployment across **20+ Dockerised microservices**, cutting release cycles **82% (45 min → under 8 min)** with zero manual intervention.

Developed **Python and Bash** automation to eliminate **~70% of recurring operational toil** — covering server operations, log triage, secret rotation and deployment workflows; integrated SonarQube quality gates and Git code-review workflows.

Operated **Kubernetes (EKS)** clusters and **Docker** containerised workloads with **ArgoCD GitOps, Helm and Ingress-NGINX** — managing zero-downtime rollouts, Karpenter node autoscaling and KEDA event-driven scaling; reduced compute costs **30% ($500+/month)**.

Drove **root-cause analysis** for **Linux-based production incidents** across CPU, memory, network and container runtime; built proactive observability with **Prometheus, Grafana, Loki and CloudWatch**; authored runbooks and post-incident reviews.

Built and maintained **AWS infrastructure monitoring** on Linux-based environments; configured CloudWatch dashboards and triaged production incidents across Kubernetes workloads; authored runbooks for recurring issue patterns and root-cause analyses.

Wrote **Python and Bash** automation scripts to streamline deployment workflows and reduce manual operational steps — demonstrated ownership and impact, earning **full-time promotion within 5 months**.

projects.title: Cloud-Native SaaS CRM Platform — Multi-Tenant AWS / EKS Build & Deploy Infrastructure
projects.tech: Terraform · AWS EKS · EC2 · S3 · Docker · Jenkins · GitLab CI/CD · ArgoCD · Ingress-NGINX · Prometheus · Grafana
bullets: Designed multi-environment build/deploy architecture with per-environment **VPC isolation and S3/DynamoDB remote state** on Linux-based EKS nodes; executed zero-downtime **EKS cluster upgrade (v1.33 → v1.34)** managing node group rollouts, add-on compatibility and API deprecation remediation.

Built multi-region **disaster recovery strategy** using Velero (EBS snapshot Data Mover), S3/ECR cross-region replication and AWS Backup with cross-region vaults — achieving **RPO < 1 hour** for production workloads.

projects.title: Healthcare Management System — Cloud Infrastructure & CI/CD
projects.tech: AWS S3 · CloudFront · App Runner · ECR · RDS · Docker · GitHub Actions · Secrets Manager · IAM · Python
bullets: Engineered **S3 + CloudFront** static hosting and Dockerised App Runner backend with a **dual-registry GHCR/ECR strategy** — enabling zero-downtime redeployments and **~30% reduced image pull latency** while serving 500+ concurrent users.

Automated full release workflow via **GitHub Actions** — Docker build, ECR/GHCR dual-push, S3 sync, CloudFront invalidation and App Runner deploy; applied least-privilege IAM scoping that removed 5+ overly permissive roles.

projects.title: Serverless Backend — Multi-Tenant Salon Management SaaS
projects.tech: AWS Lambda · SAM · CloudFormation · API Gateway · RDS PostgreSQL · EFS · Secrets Manager · Python
bullets: Architected a serverless build/deploy system using **6 nested SAM/CloudFormation templates** — enabling independent deployment of **30+ Python Lambda functions** with reproducible packaging and per-function least-privilege IAM.
Solved Lambda layer size constraints by engineering a shared **EFS-mounted Python dependency layer** across 30+ functions — eliminating packaging bottlenecks and cutting build times **60%+**.
